versions.version_description: I found that the other versions had a few important chords wrong, mostly in the chorus. So I decided to add a version that sounds right to me, it is very important to play the right sounding chords in songs.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Since the studio version of the song has a lot of bass, it's hard to hear the chords in some parts of the song. If you want to play along to it, pay attention to the singers in the background.

content:
Jazzier chords than the other versions!

Chords:

    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]C/E[/ch]      [ch]G7[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]C/G[/ch]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]

[tab]e-----0--------1-------0-------1------3-------0--------2---------|
B-----1--------1-------1-------0------3-------1--------0---------|
G-----2--------2-------0-------0------3-------0--------0---------|
D-----3--------0-------2-------0------3-------2--------0---------|
A-----3--------x-------3-------2------5-------3--------x---------|
E-----x--------x-------0-------3------3-------3--------3---------|[/tab]







Capo 1

Intro: [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]    x2


Verse 1:


[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I'm Not Surprised[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Not Everything Lasts[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I've Broken My Heart So Many Times,[/tab]

I Stop Keeping Track.
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Talk Myself In[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I Talk Myself Out[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
I Get All Worked Up[/tab]
           G           Em    (just 1 upstroke of Em)
And Then I Let Myself Down.


Pre-Chorus:


[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]C/E[/ch]
I Tried So Very Hard Not To Loose It[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]C/E[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I Thought I Thought Of Every Possibility[/tab]


Chorus 1:


[tab]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
And I Know Someday That It'll All Turn Out[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G7[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
You'll Make Me Work So We Can Work To Work It Out[/tab]
         [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]    
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]
And I Promise You Kid That I'll Give So Much More Than I Get[/tab]
    G let ring...
I Just Haven't Met You Yet

Mmmmm ....


[ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

Verse 2:


[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I Might Have To Wait[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I'll Never Give Up[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
I Guess It's Half Timing[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
And The Other Half's Luck[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Wherever You Are[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Whenever It's Right[/tab]
                  G              Em          (just 1 upstroke of Em)
You Come Out Of Nowhere And Into My Life


Pre-Chorus:

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                    [ch]C/E[/ch]
And I Know That We Can Be So Amazing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
And Baby Your Love Is Gonna Change Me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]C/E[/ch]                  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
And Now I Can See Every Possibility[/tab]

Mmmmm ......


Chorus 2:


[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G7[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
And Somehow I Know That It Will All Turn Out[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G7[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
And You'll Make Me Work So We Can Work To Work It Out[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Gm7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
And I Promise You Kid I'll Give So Much More Than I Get[/tab]
   G let ring...
I Just Haven't Met You Yet


Bridge:


[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C/G[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]

Hope you liked the tab :)
